[1]       An update to PatientDashboard inside a test was not wrapped in act(...).
[1]       
[1]       When testing, code that causes React state updates should be wrapped into act(...):
[1]       
[1]       act(() => {
[1]         /* fire events that update state */
[1]       });
[1]       /* assert on the output */
[1]       
[1]       This ensures that you're testing the behavior the user would see in the browser. Learn more at https://react.dev/link/wrap-tests-with-act
